name: prompt registry validator confirms each version carries a created timestamp in ISO-8601
command:
mkdir -p prompts && printf 'prompts:
  - id: x
    versions:
      - version: 1.0.0
        created: not-an-iso-date
' > prompts/registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/validate-registry.sh" --registry prompts/registry.yaml --check timestamps 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_iso8601=not-an-iso-date' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
